subject: fix(theme): strengthen DaisyUI migration guide accuracy and coverage
body:
Fixes from self-review:
- Replace rg --type tsx (invalid) with -g '*.tsx' glob patterns
- Add @tailwindcss/vite install step and safeStorage extraction to Phase 0
- Add incremental migration note (DaisyUI coexists with custom vars)
- Add React Native/Expo callout pointing to Uniwind sections
- Expand dark: variant search to include hover/focus/placeholder states
- Fix z-index arbitrary value syntax (z-[80] not z-80 for values >50)
- Remove incorrect "non-functional typo" claim about z-[1000]
- Add meta theme-color and accessibility checks to verification list

Tags: documentation, patterns, theme, migration, review
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pattern-alignment
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_016uMc5mZcqau5orf2HUr4aL
